pr.title: Fix compilation error that I introduced
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Tiny compile-fix PR for SysDolphin baselib AObj allocation assembly. In `src/sysdolphin/baselib/aobj.c`, `HSD_AObjAlloc` was updated to reference the named allocator data symbol `aobj_alloc_data` instead of the raw/generated label `lbl_804C0880` in the `lis`/`addi` address load pair. The stated purpose was fixing a compilation error introduced earlier.

what_changed.details: In the inline assembly implementation of `HSD_AObjAlloc`, changed the high and low relocation operands from `lbl_804C0880@ha` / `lbl_804C0880@l` to `aobj_alloc_data@ha` / `aobj_alloc_data@l`.
No instruction bytes or offsets changed in the excerpt; only the symbol name used by the address-loading relocation pair changed.

smart_moves: Preserved the exact `lis` plus `addi` address-load pattern while swapping only the symbol reference, minimizing risk to matching behavior.
Replaced an anonymous `lbl_804C0880` reference with a semantic allocator-data name, which is easier to maintain and likely resolves visibility or declaration issues causing the compile failure.
decomp_lessons: When naming a data symbol, update all inline assembly relocation references (`@ha` and `@l`) together; leaving one half on the old label can break compilation or relocation consistency.
For inline assembly that must remain byte-matching, symbol-name cleanup can be safe as long as the resolved address and instruction sequence remain unchanged.
Compile fixes in decomp code may be as small as replacing a raw label with the canonical symbol name expected by the surrounding C declarations.

naming_conventions.lesson: Prefer descriptive object-allocation data names over raw address labels once a symbol's role is known.

assembly_or_matching_tactics: Kept the original handwritten assembly body for `HSD_AObjAlloc`.
Maintained the same PowerPC relocation style: `symbol@ha` loaded with `lis`, then `symbol@l` added with `addi`.
Changed only symbol operands, not the instruction order, registers, stack frame setup, or branch to `HSD_ObjAlloc`.
follow_up_queries: Find the PR or commit that introduced `aobj_alloc_data` or renamed `lbl_804C0880`.
Search for remaining references to `lbl_804C0880` to ensure the symbol rename was completed everywhere.
Check nearby AObj allocator declarations to confirm `aobj_alloc_data` linkage and type.
